summary: Completed testing of derived_state_service.py fix for ReadyForPost decision handling. All 8 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend verified: ReadyForPost documents correctly display 'Validated' (green) badge and 'Ready to Post' status, NOT 'Failed' (red). The fix correctly checks the 'decision' field FIRST before 'auto_clear'/'auto_post' booleans.
seed_data_creation: Created test documents with ReadyForPost status and workflow_events in workflow_events collection
context_for_next_testing_agent: ReadyForPost derived state fix fully tested. Key verifications: (1) automation.decision.completed with decision='ReadyForPost' sets validation_state='pass', workflow_state='ready', needs_review=False, blocking_issues=[], (2) NeedsReview decision sets workflow_state='reviewing', needs_review=True, (3) Posted decision sets workflow_state='completed', validation_state='pass', (4) Legacy fallback for ReadyForPost status correctly maps to validation_state='pass', workflow_state='ready', (5) auto_clear=True without decision still sets workflow_state='completed' (backward compat), (6) Frontend UnifiedQueuePage shows 'Ready to Post' (green) for ReadyForPost status, (7) Frontend DocumentDetailPage shows 'Validated' (green) badge for validation_state='pass'.

bug_fix_verification.original_bug: AP invoices marked as ReadyForPost by ap_auto_post_service displayed 'Failed' (red) validation badge instead of 'Validated/Pass' (green). Root cause: automation.decision.completed events with both auto_clear=True and decision=ReadyForPost were handled by the auto_clear branch first, never reaching the ReadyForPost branch which sets validation_state='pass'.
fix_applied: derived_state_service.py: Restructured automation.decision.completed handler to check 'decision' field FIRST before 'auto_clear'/'auto_post' booleans
derived_state_service.py: Legacy fallback now handles ReadyForPost status before auto_cleared override
Frontend already had correct STATUS_LABELS and getStatusColor for ReadyForPost
verification_details: Created test document with status=ReadyForPost, auto_cleared=True, and workflow_events including automation.decision.completed with decision='ReadyForPost' and auto_clear=True
Frontend document detail page shows 'Validated' (green) badge, not 'Failed' (red)
Frontend queue shows 'Ready to Post' (green) status badge
